title: Lead SEO Specialist at WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Madurai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions:
WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions!
